~/ Senior Staff Engineer · Computer Vision · Stryker

Prakhar Thakur

Self-supervised learning  ·  Medical video AI  ·  Production ML systems

In ML since 2018, before it was everyone's headline. I build computer vision that has to work in the real world, not just on benchmarks. Today I work on ambient intelligence for healthcare, and I write here about how machines come to represent the world.

Understanding the world through mathematics, computer science, logic, and philosophy
